title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details - Cancel button
scenario: Tapping Cancel (X) on the geo icon when device is disconnected/out of range dismisses the window and returns to the Find My Device map with connected devices list.
steps: Ensure a device is disconnected or out of range
Tap the Cancel (X) button on the gray geo icon
expected: The window is dismissed and the user is returned to the Find My Device map with the list of connected devices.
